title: artemisia lactiflora var. taibaishanensis
intro: Artemisia lactiflora var. taibaishanensis, also known as Taibaishan wormwood, is a variant of the white mugwort plant, which belongs to the asteraceae family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which have been utilized in traditional Chinese medicine. The health benefits of Taibaishan wormwood include its ability to alleviate fever, reduce swelling, and promote digestive health, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies. Taibaishan wormwood can be prepared in various forms, including tea, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to support immune function and relieve symptoms of colds and flu.
